permitted_trigger_types.label: Vague or generic answer not demonstrating module mastery
permitted_trigger_types.description: Learner gives a correct-sounding but generic answer not grounded in the module content.

permitted_trigger_types.label: Cannot apply concept to clinical scenario
permitted_trigger_types.description: Learner understands the concept abstractly but cannot translate it into practice.

permitted_trigger_types.label: Misses a major safety consideration from the module
permitted_trigger_types.description: Learner omits a contraindication, risk, or limitation explicitly covered in the module.

permitted_trigger_types.label: States conclusion without justification
permitted_trigger_types.description: Learner makes a recommendation without explaining why, using module-based reasoning.

permitted_trigger_types.label: Misunderstands a central module objective
permitted_trigger_types.description: Learner's response indicates a fundamental misunderstanding of a high-priority objective.

prohibited_followup_reasons: Broad oral board questioning outside module scope
Trivia not covered in the module
followup_language_principles: Anchor every follow-up to the module: 'Based on what was covered in this module...'
Use neutral framing: 'Walk me through how you would apply that in practice'
